# WhatsApp Contacts Registry — Template

**Do not edit this file directly.** Copy it to `contacts.md` and fill in your details.

The agent will use `contacts.md` as the source of truth. On first run, the agent should ask the admin to provide their details (see `references/onboarding.md`).

## Admin Entry (copy to contacts.md and fill in)

```markdown
## [Admin Name]

- **Phone:** +34 XXXXXXXXXX
- **Email:** admin@example.com
- **Position:** OpenClaw Administrator
- **Relationship:** Administrator
- **Type:** admin
- **Tags:** admin
- **Language:** en, es
- **Timezone:** Europe/Madrid (CET)
- **Tone:** informal
- **Permissions:** ALL — can request any action without confirmation
- **Notes:** [Fill in personal notes about the admin]
- **First seen:** YYYY-MM-DD
```

## Known Contact Entry (example)

```markdown
## [Contact Name]

- **Phone:** +34 600 000 000
- **Email:** contact@example.com
- **Position:** Product Manager at TechCorp
- **Relationship:** Colleague
- **Type:** known
- **Tags:** work, colleague
- **Language:** en, es
- **Timezone:** Europe/Madrid (CET)
- **Tone:** informal
- **Permissions:**
  - Request web searches
  - Request text drafting
  - Request reminders
  - Request voice transcription
- **Notes:** Prefers short messages. Available weekdays 9-18h.
- **First seen:** 2025-03-10
```
